stemHtml: After requesting detailed hold instructions, what information should the pilot expect to receive?

options.a: Name of navaid and radial, distance of leg (optional), altitude (optional), direction of turn (optional), expected landing time.
options.b: Name of fix, level (optional),inbound track (optional),direction of turn (optional),time of leg (optional), expected approach clearance time.
options.c: Name of fix, inbound heading (optional), direction of turn (optional), altitude of hold, time of leg (optional), estimated time of arrival, additional instructions.
options.d: Name of fix, level (optional), outbound heading, direction of turn (optional), expected approach clearance time (optional).
